Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('vahdam_mailer_architect_v23.html','utf8'\); const scriptMatch=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(scriptMatch\){scriptMatch.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{const code=s.replace\(/<script[^>]*>/,''\).replace\(/<\\/script>/,''\); try{new Function\(code\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('SCRIPT BLOCK',i,'ERROR:',e.message\);}}\);} console.log\('Scripts checked:',scriptMatch?scriptMatch.length:0\);")
